{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Uncrowned King competitors
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Uncrowned King competitors]] have used towers in [[Ninecloud City]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
